info.name: SPARC API v1
info.description: Complete API collection for SPARC (Systematic Policy and Regulatory Compliance). 99 endpoints across 18 folders covering OSCAL document lifecycle, FedRAMP 20x KSI management, federation, and platform administration.

item.name: Discovery
item.description: API discovery endpoint for authorization-scoped endpoint enumeration.

item.name: SSP Documents
item.description: System Security Plan (SSP) document lifecycle management. Supports CRUD operations, Excel file conversion, and JSON export.

request.description:
Creates a new SSP document. The document is associated with an authorization boundary and will be initialized with empty control fields ready for population.

Response: 201 Created with the new SSP document JSON including its generated slug.

Updates an existing SSP document's metadata (name, description). Does not modify controls or control fields directly.

Response: 200 OK with the updated SSP document JSON.

Soft-deletes an SSP document. The document is marked as deleted but retained in the database for audit purposes. Can be restored by an administrator.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

formdata.description: Authorization boundary to associate the parsed document with

request.description:
Exports an SSP document as a downloadable JSON file. The export includes the full document hierarchy: document metadata, controls, and all control fields.

Response: 200 OK with Content-Disposition header for file download.
Bulk-update editable control fields on one SSP. Delegates to SspUpdateService. Returns the full updated document so the caller can refresh in one round-trip.

item.name: SAR Documents
item.description: Security Assessment Report (SAR) document lifecycle management. Supports CRUD operations, Excel file conversion, and JSON export.

request.description:
Creates a new SAR document associated with an authorization boundary.

Response: 201 Created with the new SAR document JSON including its generated slug.

Returns a single SAR document by slug, including all associated controls, control fields, and assessment findings.

Response: 200 OK with full SAR document JSON.

Updates an existing SAR document's metadata.

Response: 200 OK with the updated SAR document JSON.

Soft-deletes a SAR document. The document is retained for audit trail purposes.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

formdata.description: Excel file (.xlsx) containing SAR assessment data
Authorization boundary to associate the parsed document with

request.description:
Uploads an Excel (.xlsx) file for asynchronous parsing into a SAR document. Processed by a background Sidekiq job.

Response: 202 Accepted with conversion job details.

Exports a SAR document as a downloadable JSON file including all assessment findings and control results.

Response: 200 OK with Content-Disposition header for file download.
Bulk-update editable control fields on one SAR. Only fields whose backing SarControlField is editable? are mutated; non-editable fields silently skip.

item.name: SAP Documents
item.description: Security Assessment Plan (SAP) document lifecycle management. CRUD operations for assessment planning documents.

request.description:
Creates a new SAP document defining the scope, methodology, and schedule for a security assessment.

Response: 201 Created with the new SAP document JSON.

Returns a single SAP document by slug with full assessment plan details.

Response: 200 OK with SAP document JSON.

Updates an existing SAP document's metadata.

Response: 200 OK with the updated SAP document JSON.

Soft-deletes a SAP document. Retained for audit trail purposes.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

item.name: POA&M Documents
item.description: Plan of Action and Milestones (POA&M) document lifecycle management. Tracks remediation plans for identified security weaknesses.

request.description:
Creates a new POA&M document for tracking remediation milestones and scheduled completion dates for identified weaknesses.

Response: 201 Created with the new POA&M document JSON.

Returns a single POA&M document by slug with all remediation items and milestone tracking details.

Response: 200 OK with POA&M document JSON.

Updates an existing POA&M document's metadata.

Response: 200 OK with the updated POA&M document JSON.

Soft-deletes a POA&M document. Retained for audit trail purposes.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

item.name: Control Catalogs
item.description: NIST SP 800-53 control catalog management. Admin-only for create, update, and delete operations.

request.description:
Creates a new control catalog. Admin-only endpoint. Catalogs serve as the reference framework for control implementations across all document types.

Response: 201 Created with the new catalog JSON.

Returns a single control catalog by ID, including all control families and their controls.

Response: 200 OK with full catalog JSON including nested families and controls.

Updates a control catalog's metadata. Admin-only endpoint.

Response: 200 OK with the updated catalog JSON.

Deletes a control catalog. Admin-only endpoint. Will fail if any documents reference controls from this catalog.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

item.name: Profile Documents
item.description: Security profile document management. Profiles define baseline selections and parameter settings for control catalogs (e.g., FedRAMP Moderate baseline).

request.description:
Creates a new profile document linked to a control catalog. The profile can then have baseline parameters configured.

Response: 201 Created with the new profile document JSON.

Returns a single profile document by slug with baseline selections and parameter settings.

Response: 200 OK with full profile document JSON.

Updates a profile document's metadata.

Response: 200 OK with the updated profile document JSON.

Soft-deletes a profile document. Retained for audit trail purposes.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

item.name: Baseline Parameters
item.description: Profile baseline parameter management. Get, update, and export parameter assignments for profile-selected controls.

query.description: Filter parameters by NIST control family abbreviation (e.g., ac, au, cm)

request.description: Bulk-update baseline parameter values for a profile.
Download the baseline parameter set in YAML or JSON form.
Get the baseline parameters schema for a profile, optionally scoped to one family.

item.name: CDEF Documents
item.description: Component Definition (CDEF) document lifecycle management. CDEFs describe how a component implements specific security controls.

request.description:
Creates a new Component Definition document. Can also be created via OSCAL JSON/YAML/XML import or from a published profile.

Response: 201 Created with the new CDEF document JSON.

Returns a single CDEF document by slug with all component controls and implementation details.

Response: 200 OK with full CDEF document JSON.

Updates a CDEF document's metadata.

Response: 200 OK with the updated CDEF document JSON.

Soft-deletes a CDEF document. Retained for audit trail purposes.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

item.name: Control Mappings
item.description: Cross-framework control mapping management. Maps controls between different frameworks (e.g., NIST to ISO 27001). Admin-only for mutations.

request.description:
Creates a new control mapping between two controls from different catalogs/frameworks. Admin-only endpoint. Relationship types: equivalent, partial, superset, subset.

Response: 201 Created with the new mapping JSON.

Returns a single control mapping by ID with full source and target control details.

Response: 200 OK with control mapping JSON.

Updates an existing control mapping. Admin-only endpoint.

Response: 200 OK with the updated mapping JSON.

Deletes a control mapping. Admin-only endpoint.

Response: 200 OK with confirmation message.

item.name: KSI Catalog
item.description: FedRAMP 20x Key Security Indicator (KSI) catalog. Read-only reference data for KSI themes, indicators, and NIST control mappings.

query.description: Filter by KSI theme code (e.g., AUTH, VULN, CONFIG)
Filter by FedRAMP impact level: low, moderate, high

item.name: KSI Validations
item.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI validation management per authorization boundary. Track validation status, evidence, and generate compliance reports.

request.description: List KSI validation records for one boundary.
Create a new KSI validation record under this boundary.

Returns a single KSI validation by ID with full details including associated control information, evidence, and audit history.

Response: 200 OK with validation JSON.
Update an existing KSI validation.
Delete a KSI validation record.

query.description: Export format: json (default), yaml, or xml

request.description:
Exports a comprehensive KSI validation report for an authorization boundary. Includes all validations with evidence, timestamps, and NIST control mappings. Supports JSON, YAML, and XML formats.

Response: 200 OK with Content-Disposition header for file download. Format controlled by ?format= query parameter (json|yaml|xml).
Show one validation record.
Dashboard-style aggregation of validation status counts for this boundary.
Export the KSI compliance report for this boundary.

Bcrypt the supplied plaintext password into the admin user's password_digest. Idempotent — same value returns 200 unchanged. Requires admin.rotate_credentials permission and SPARC_ADMIN_REFRESH_ENABLED=true.

query.description: Name of the FederationPeer requesting the bundle
ISO-8601 timestamp; only resources updated at/after this time are included

request.description: Build and return an HMAC-signed federation envelope for the named peer. Requires back_matter.federate permission. The peer must be a registered FederationPeer.
Verify a signed envelope from a registered peer and ingest each contained back-matter resource. Returns per-resource imported/skipped/errors buckets.
List authorization boundaries the caller has access to. Admins see all; non-admins see only boundaries they are members of.
Retrieve one authorization boundary by id.
Create a new authorization boundary. Requires admin or appropriate organization role.
Update an authorization boundary's mutable fields.
Soft-delete an authorization boundary.
List back-matter resources with optional filters. Requires back_matter.read.
Show one resource with linked controls and resource_data.
Create a new back-matter resource. Requires back_matter.write. Only admins can create source: 'authoritative' resources.
Update an existing back-matter resource.
Hard-delete a resource and unlink all its control associations.
Link this resource to a control. linkable_type must be one of: CatalogControl, CdefControl, ProfileControl, SspControl, SarControl, SapControl.
Remove a control link without deleting the resource.
Mark this resource as pending authoritative promotion. Requires back_matter.promote or back_matter.write.
Approve a pending promotion. Requires back_matter.approve_promotion or per-resource approver authority.
Reject a pending promotion with an optional reason.
Soft-archive a resource (archived_at set). Excluded from default index and exporter paths until restored.
Restore a previously-archived resource.
Reverse-chronological change-log for one resource: archive/restore, federation updates, bulk-import events.
Create many resources in one transaction. Returns batch_uuid plus per-entry imported/skipped/errors buckets. Requires back_matter.bulk_import or back_matter.write.
List pending promotions the caller is authorized to approve. Self-filtering — no separate permission gate.
List all configured peers ordered by name. Not paginated.
Show one peer with detailed public_metadata.
Register a new peer. service_token and signing_secret are write-only and never echoed back.
Update a peer's mutable fields. Submitting service_token/signing_secret rotates the secret. name is not mutable post-create.
Hard-delete a peer from the registry.
Pull authoritative resources from this peer using its stored service_token, verify the signed envelope, and ingest the bundle.

query.description: Partial-match filter on first or last name
Filter by status: active | inactive | locked

request.description: List users (admin only).
Show one user with roles. Admin or self.
Create a new user (admin only).
Update a user. Admins can edit any user; non-admins can only edit their own name/email.
Soft-delete (deactivate) a user. Admin only.
